CODE VEIN II.notes:
⚠️ This game supports UE-Extended using native HDR. Additional steps must be taken for this to work.

Launch the game with UE-Extended installed to generate the correct segment of ReShade.ini.
Close the game and in ReShade.ini look for the line that says 'Set_Path=1' and change this to 'Set_Path=0'

Create an Engine.ini in the game's Appdata folder with the following information:

[SystemSettings]
r.AllowHDR=1
r.HDR.EnableHDROutput=1
r.HDR.Display.OutputDevice=3
r.HDR.Display.ColorGamut=2
r.HDR.UI.CompositeMode=1

[/Script/Engine.RendererSettings]
r.LUT.UpdateEveryFrame=1

You can download a preconfigured Engine.ini here:

Launch the game with UE-Extended installed to generate the correct segment of ReShade.ini.
Close the game and in ReShade.ini look for the line that says 'Set_Path=1' and change this to 'Set_Path=0'

Cyberpunk 2077.notes:
⚠️ The RenoDX mod for Cyberpunk 2077 is a WIP. Always get the latest build directly from the RenoDX Discord — it is updated more frequently than any wiki download.

See Creepy's Cyberpunk RenoDX Guide for setup instructions:

Dishonored.notes:
ℹ️ This game has both 32-bit and 64-bit RenoDX builds.

• 64-bit (default) — for the Microsoft Store and Epic Games Store versions.
• 32-bit — for the Steam version. Enable 32-bit mode in 🎯 Overrides to use this.

Dragon Quest VII Reimagined.notes:
ℹ️ Optional: Enable HDR from Engine.ini with DQ7RFix. see below.
Add the following cvars to the DQ7RFix.ini.

r.AllowHDR=1
r.HDR.EnableHDROutput=1
r.HDR.Display.OutputDevice=5
r.HDR.Display.ColorGamut=2
r.HDR.UI.CompositeMode=1
r.HDR.UI.Level=1.5

The game has to be run in DX11 mode with '-dx11' argument.

If using the recommended Engine.ini route then you must also set the Processing Path to Engine HDR in the RenoDX tab of ReShade once in game.

This is reported to have the best result. SDR upgrade with DX11 and DX12 still works, but can exhibit UI/fog rendering problems.

DRAGON QUEST® XI S: Echoes of an Elusive.notes:
ℹ️ Optional: Enable HDR from Engine.ini. The SDR upgrade path might break some text box UIs.

r.AllowHDR=1
r.HDR.EnableHDROutput=1
r.HDR.Display.OutputDevice=5
r.HDR.Display.ColorGamut=2
r.HDR.UI.CompositeMode=1
r.HDR.UI.Level=1.5

Also support the original game. By default it uses Filmic Postprocess (Mobile).
Compatible with Luma DLSS/DLAA.

Terraria.notes: ⚠️ Terraria requires admin privileges to install ReShade. RHI creates a symlink in the GAC directory, which needs elevated permissions. If the install fails, try running RHI as administrator.

Titan Quest II.notes:
⚠️ This game supports UE-Extended using native HDR. Additional steps must be taken for this to work.

The only way to enable native HDR is by using the Ultra Plus mod which is linked below

Launch the game with UE-Extended installed to generate the correct segment of ReShade.ini.
Close the game and in ReShade.ini look for the line that says 'Set_Path=1' and change this to 'Set_Path=0'

Game screen will go black while in inventory while using UE-Extended in this title

Download Ultra Plus mod here, Ultra Plus Mod Manager recommended:

tModLoader.notes:
⚠️ You must run the game once in order to create the correct directories for ReShade/RenoDX to work.
After running the game once click Refresh and make sure directory is detected as /tModLoader/dotnet before installing anything
